babySize: Your baby is the size of a poppy seed
development: Week 1 brings new growth milestones. Your baby's organs and systems continue developing rapidly during this stage of pregnancy.
momFeeling: You may notice changing energy levels and body sensations typical of week 1. Listen to your body and rest when needed.
tip: Stay hydrated and eat balanced meals this week. Small, frequent snacks can help with comfort.
